creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
http://kopete.kde.org/

Kopet is in Sources for kdenetwork

kdenetwork-4.10.4/kopete

Please remove from Makefile and update Port that use KDE4

DEPRECATED=     Depends on QT3; unmaintained
EXPIRATION_DATE=        2013-07-01

USE_KDELIBS_VER=3

Fix: 

Update port and all other KDE3 Ports to KDE4
